query:
SELECT 'users' as tabela, COUNT(*) as total FROM users
UNION ALL SELECT 'leads', COUNT(*) FROM leads
UNION ALL SELECT 'projects', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_history', COUNT(*) FROM lead_history
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_status_transitions', COUNT(*) FROM lead_status_transitions
UNION ALL SELECT 'agendamentos', COUNT(*) FROM agendamentos
UNION ALL SELECT 'visitas', COUNT(*) FROM visitas
UNION ALL SELECT 'distribution_log', COUNT(*) FROM distribution_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'atividades_diarias', COUNT(*) FROM atividades_diarias
UNION ALL SELECT 'metas', COUNT(*) FROM metas
UNION ALL SELECT 'metas_diarias', COUNT(*) FROM metas_diarias
UNION ALL SELECT 'conquistas', COUNT(*) FROM conquistas
UNION ALL SELECT 'contratos', COUNT(*) FROM contratos
UNION ALL SELECT 'comissoes', COUNT(*) FROM comissoes
UNION ALL SELECT 'propostas', COUNT(*) FROM propostas
UNION ALL SELECT 'follow_ups', COUNT(*) FROM follow_ups
UNION ALL SELECT 'tarefas', COUNT(*) FROM tarefas
UNION ALL SELECT 'notifications', COUNT(*) FROM notifications
UNION ALL SELECT 'equipes', COUNT(*) FROM equipes
UNION ALL SELECT 'fila_distribuicao', COUNT(*) FROM fila_distribuicao
UNION ALL SELECT 'alertas_produtividade', COUNT(*) FROM alertas_produtividade
UNION ALL SELECT 'historico_presenca', COUNT(*) FROM historico_presenca
UNION ALL SELECT 'conversas_chatbot', COUNT(*) FROM conversas_chatbot
UNION ALL SELECT 'lead_estoque', COUNT(*) FROM lead_estoque
UNION ALL SELECT 'historico_atribuicoes', COUNT(*) FROM historico_atribuicoes
UNION ALL SELECT 'interacoes', COUNT(*) FROM interacoes
UNION ALL SELECT 'documentacoes', COUNT(*) FROM documentacoes
UNION ALL SELECT 'analises_credito', COUNT(*) FROM analises_credito
UNION ALL SELECT 'log_transferencias', COUNT(*) FROM log_transferencias
UNION ALL SELECT 'indicacoes', COUNT(*) FROM indicacoes
ORDER BY total DESC;
